---
name: UI/UX Improvement
about: Propose refinements to current designs, spacing, typography, or interactive states.
title: 'ui/ux: [Short description of the visual polish]'
labels: 'ui/ux, enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Current Experience
Describe the current design or interface layout and what can be improved.

## Proposed Improvement
Describe the visual change, new typography, hover effects, glassmorphic styles, or layout adjustments.

## Mockups / Visual References
Provide screenshots of the current design and wireframes, mockups, or reference designs of the proposed solution.

## Acceptance Criteria
Define what is required for this UI/UX improvement to be considered complete (e.g. responsiveness on mobile, custom hover transitions, specific hex colors).
